summary: Tested Facebook Gallery Sync and New Leads Management System features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Gallery page verified with filter tabs and Facebook badges working correctly. CRM Dashboard requires 2FA authentication so frontend testing was limited to code review.
seed_data_creation: Created test lead for mark-contacted API test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: Facebook Gallery Sync API returns 46 synced posts at /api/social/gallery/public?type=all. New Leads Count API at /api/crm/new-leads/count works. New Leads List API at /api/crm/new-leads returns leads with is_new=True. Mark Lead Contacted API at /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}/mark-contacted works and removes NEW badge. Gallery page shows filter tabs (All Projects, Latest, Uploads) with correct counts. Facebook posts display with blue 'Facebook' badge. CRM Dashboard code has '🆕 New' tab with green background and red badge for new leads count - requires 2FA to access.

features_verified.New Leads Count API /api/crm/new-leads/c: VERIFIED - Returns count of leads with is_new=True
features_verified.New Leads List API /api/crm/new-leads: VERIFIED - Returns leads with is_new=True flag, pagination working
features_verified.Mark Lead Contacted API /api/crm/leads/{: VERIFIED - Removes NEW badge, updates lead_status to in_progress
features_verified.Gallery page filter tabs: VERIFIED - All Projects (51), Latest (46), Uploads (5) tabs present and working
features_verified.Gallery Facebook badge: VERIFIED - Blue 'Facebook' badge displayed on synced posts
features_verified.CRM Dashboard New tab: VERIFIED via code review - '🆕 New' tab with Inbox icon and red badge for newLeadsCount

api_tests_passed: GET /api/crm/new-leads/count - Returns count of new leads
GET /api/crm/leads - Returns leads list with pagination

Gallery page.filter_tabs: All Projects (51), Latest (46) with Facebook icon, Uploads (5)
Gallery page.facebook_badge: Blue badge with Facebook icon on synced posts

CRM Dashboard.code_review: New tab implementation verified in CRMDashboard.js lines 1478, 1495, 1869, 1976-1988
